description: At Nadeer's estate, after his powers manifest, Vijay chooses to leave with his sister, rebuffing Simmons and S.H.I.E.L.D.'s offer of sanctuary. Mace and Simmons reluctantly accept his decision. Privately, Ellen reveals her betrayal and has Vijay executed, upholding their promise despite her conflicted feelings.

transcript.line: Where is my sister?
Probably best that she's not here for this.
What the f...
Guess now we know what your power is.
He's here.
We don't know that. Okay, now we do.
Go find Vijay. I'll take care of them.
It's over, AIDA.
I did not kill anyone here. That was intentional.
You murdered Nathanson.
Nathanson insisted he reboot me before repairing my wounds. I regret what happened.
Regret's not part of your programming.
The Darkhold fixed that. It showed me regret and desire, so many astonishing things.
It made you dangerous.
I only wanted to help you.
Roll credits.
Sorry, AIDA.
Take him out!
Did you know he could...
I did not.
Vijay.
I didn't know.
Vijay, you need to come with us.
Jemma.
She's seen what you are. That's why they're here. S.H.I.E.L.D. wants to make you their weapon.
Nothing could be further from the truth. It's like I said when we first met, I have friends just like you.
Are they agents?
Yes, but that was their choice.
She's lying. I trusted you. Now trust me. We're family. Please, we have to go now.
Vijay, don't do this. You're making a mistake. He's not safe with her.
Jemma. Vijay had a choice, and he made it. I'm sorry. You did everything you could.
As did you.
Get us out of here.
Little brother, don't worry about them. Look at me. I want you to know how sorry I am. But we made each other a promise.
Never question me again. Is that understood? S.H.I.E.L.D. isn't going away. We need to strike back.
I can assemble a team.

That won't be necessary. I think it's time The Superior sends some men of his own. [Music] I trust they'll be able to get the job done. But there is one thing I still need from you. Get rid of the body.
